_meta.status: DRAFT v1 — derived from 10_PRODUCT/Recommendation_Engine.md. Reconcile against the prototype.

priorityNote: Always rank Modern > Stylish > Flattering. Never invert. Flattering is the floor, not the goal.

verdicts.Yes: Top Pick or Best Styles on all relevant axes
verdicts.With Adjustments: Style With Care on one axis; surface the adjustment note
verdicts.No: Works against the shape goal with no reasonable adjustment

confidence.High: Variables clearly determined; strong on all axes
confidence.Medium: One variable borderline, or one axis Style With Care
confidence.Low: Variables uncertain (poor photo/unresolved validation); prompt user or widen guidance

conflictResolution: 1. Never recommend something that defeats the shape's Start-Here priority.
2. Body Shape silhouette outranks Colour for garment CUT; Colour outranks Body for COLOUR/METAL.
3. Face Styling governs accessories/hair; yields to Colour on colour/metal.
4. If still tied, choose the option ranking higher on Modern > Stylish > Flattering.
5. If Style With Care on one axis but Top Pick on another, surface with the adjustment note rather than dropping it.
